member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Commands.Register.RegisterCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles user registration commands. Checks email uniqueness, hashes the password, saves the user and generates a JWT token.
Handles user registration commands. Checks email uniqueness, hashes the password, saves the user and generates a JWT token.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Commands.Register.RegisterCommandHandler.Handle(UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Commands.Register.RegisterCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a user registration request.
member.param: Registration command containing login, email and password.
member.returns: Authentication result with user data and JWT token, or DuplicateEmail error if user already exists.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries.LoginQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles user login queries. Validates user credentials and generates a JWT token.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries.LoginQueryHandler.#ctor(UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Authentication.IJwtTokenGenerator,UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Repositories.IUserRepository,UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPasswordHasher)
member.summary: Handles user login queries. Validates user credentials and generates a JWT token.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries.LoginQueryHandler.Handle(UrlShortener.Application.Authentication.Queries.LoginQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Processes a login request.
member.param: Login query containing email and password.
member.returns: Authentication result with JWT token if credentials are valid; otherwise InvalidCredentials error.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService
member.summary: Provides abstraction for cache operations. Application layer does not depend on a concrete cache provider.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService.GetAsync``1(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Gets a cached value by key.
member.returns: Cached value or null if key does not exist.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService.SetAsync``1(System.String,``0,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Saves a value to cache with expiration time.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService.RemoveAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Removes a value from cache by key.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IMessagePublisher
member.summary: Provides abstraction for publishing integration events. Application layer does not depend on RabbitMQ or another concrete message broker.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IMessagePublisher.PublishAsync``1(``0,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publishes a message to the configured message broker.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPasswordHasher
member.summary: Provides password hashing and verification functionality.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPasswordHasher.HashPassword(System.String)
member.summary: Hashes a plain text password.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IPasswordHasher.VerifyHashedPassword(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Verifies whether a plain text password matches the stored hash.
member.returns: True if password is valid; otherwise, false.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IShortUrlBuilder
member.summary: Builds a full short URL from a generated short code.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IShortUrlBuilder.BuildShortUrl(System.String)
member.summary: Builds a complete short URL using current HTTP request scheme and host.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IUrlCodeGenerator
member.summary: Provides functionality for generating short URL codes.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.UrlActions.IUrlCodeGenerator.GenerateCode(UrlShortener.Domain.UrlAggregate.ValueObjects.UrlId)
member.summary: Generates a short code based on URL identifier.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Commands.ShortenUrlCommandHandler
member.summary: Handles commands for creating short URLs. Uses database storage, Redis cache and RabbitMQ messaging.
Handles commands for creating short URLs. Uses database storage, Redis cache and RabbitMQ messaging.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Commands.ShortenUrlCommandHandler.Handle(UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Commands.ShortenUrlCommand,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Creates a new short URL or returns an existing one. If a new URL is created, the method saves it to the database, stores redirect data in cache and publishes a URL created event.
member.param: Command containing the original long URL.
member.returns: UrlResult with URL identifier and generated short URL.

member.name: T:UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Queries.RedirectQueries.RedirectQueryHandler
member.summary: Handles redirect queries by short URL code. Uses Redis cache to speed up redirects and publishes redirect events for analytics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Queries.RedirectQueries.RedirectQueryHandler.#ctor(UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Repositories.IUrlRepository,UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.ICacheService,UrlShortener.Application.Common.Interfaces.Services.IMessagePublisher)
member.summary: Handles redirect queries by short URL code. Uses Redis cache to speed up redirects and publishes redirect events for analytics.

member.name: M:UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Queries.RedirectQueries.RedirectQueryHandler.Handle(UrlShortener.Application.UrlActions.Queries.RedirectQueries.RedirectQuery,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Finds the original long URL by short code. The method first checks cache. If the value is not cached, it loads URL data from the database, caches it and publishes a redirect event.
member.param: Redirect query containing short URL code.
member.returns: Original long URL or NotFound error.
